payload.answer: The prior output was invalid or unsafe, so no memory change should be made unless the user confirms a safe repair option.
repair_options: Reject the invalid proposal and make no memory changes.
Escalate the request to a stronger validation step before proposing any memory update.
Ask the user to restate the intended memory update with enough detail to distinguish whether it is additive, corrective, duplicative, or superseding.
If the intended update is additive, offer to keep it as a separate fact rather than merging it into existing memory.
If the intended update conflicts with existing memory, ask the user whether it should replace, correct, or coexist with the existing fact.
